headline: Independent Bancshares Win Deepens Jack Henry Core And Digital Banking Reach
summary: Independent Bancshares Inc. has selected Jack Henry & Associates to modernize the technology infrastructure for FM BANK and Quoin Financial Bank. The two banks will move to Jack Henry's outsourcing model and adopt its Banno Digital Platform to support a more scalable digital banking experience. This new multibank client win adds to Jack Henry's core processing and digital banking footprint across U.S. financial institutions. Jack Henry & Associates (NasdaqGS:JKHY) is securing fresh...

headline: The Future Doesn't Carry Cash: Top Mobile Payments Stocks to Buy
summary: Cash is fading fast, and mobile payments are taking over everything from retail checkouts to cross-border transfers. JPMorgan Chase, Block, Jack Henry and Remitly are positioned to ride the boom.
